Subject: Your new ACE opportunity is ready — Turmeric Market Survey (SYNTHETIC)

Hi {{LLO_FIRST_NAME}},

Your team's new ACE opportunity is configured and ready for FLW
invites. Here's everything you need to start.

## What this opportunity is about

FLWs visit local markets, photograph turmeric vendors with a yellow
MTN color-reference card, complete a short structured form, and
deliver a brief educational message. The goal is a geo-tagged dataset
of turmeric availability and quality signals across markets — analysts
will use it to flag candidate markets for lab-based adulteration
testing.

## Getting started

1. **Accept the opportunity invite** in your Connect dashboard:
   https://connect.dimagi.com/a/connect-ace-prod/opportunities/turmeric-market-survey
2. **Read the LLO Manager Guide** — your operations playbook:
   https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/<turmeric-opp>/training-materials/llo-manager-guide.md
3. **Print the FLW Quick Reference card** for each FLW:
   https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/<turmeric-opp>/training-materials/quick-reference.md
4. **Send the FLW Training Guide to your roster** before they start:
   https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/<turmeric-opp>/training-materials/flw-training-guide.md

## What FLWs get paid

10 USD per delivery, up to 20 deliveries per FLW per day, 5 per market.

## Where to ask questions

The OCS support widget at
https://www.openchatstudio.com/embed/turmeric-survey/ answers
questions about this opportunity in particular — payment rules,
verification flags, the education message script, what to do when X.
Open it any time.

For platform-level questions or escalations, reply to this email.

## Next 48 hours

We'll check in once your first 5 FLW submissions land to make sure
quality looks right. If you have questions before then, ping the
widget or reply here.

Thanks for partnering with us, {{LLO_FIRST_NAME}} — looking forward
to seeing the data.

— The ACE team
